notes:
Skip per Rules 0/2/3/4. Slice hint is null; the user's note pointed at 'Wei Pan at TU Delft' (robotics/control) but disambiguation cannot be resolved.

Char-match check (Rule 0) — FAILED for the robotics candidate as a primary source: Wei Pan (Newcastle Univ, ex-TU-Delft, ex-Manchester, ex-DJI, Imperial PhD) is found on https://panweihit.github.io/, https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=GqryWPsAAAAJ (verified email at newcastle.ac.uk, listed email wei.pan2@newcastle.ac.uk), https://api.github.com/users/panweihit (name: 'Wei Pan'). NONE of these primary sources show the characters 潘炜. Pinyin 'Wei Pan' can map to 潘炜/潘伟/潘巍/潘维/潘玮. Search-engine summaries paraphrase 'Wei Pan' as 潘炜 but those are LLM/translation artifacts, not primary evidence. Per Rule 0, the candidate page MUST show the input chars; pinyin alone is not a signal.

Disambiguation (Rule 2) — FAILED: at least one other distinct 潘炜 with the EXACT chars on a primary page: 潘炜, Professor and Dean of School of Information Science and Technology, Southwest Jiaotong University (SWJTU), optical communications / semiconductor lasers / microwave photonics, State Council Special Allowance recipient. Faculty page https://faculty.swjtu.edu.cn/panwei/zh_CN/index.htm has chars explicitly. With no slice hint and no other anchor, both candidates are equally plausible for a generic Chinese-language DNC entry — and the SWJTU one actually has the stronger char-evidence on a primary page.

Last-30-days activity (Rule 3) — FAILED: Robotics Wei Pan's https://panweihit.github.io/news/ latest dated entry is 2022; GitHub events feed (https://api.github.com/users/panweihit/events/public) returned []. No 2026 activity surfaced for SWJTU 潘炜 in the last 30 days either.

Rule 4 (better empty than wrong) governs: emailing wei.pan2@newcastle.ac.uk would leak through DNC if the entry actually refers to SWJTU 潘炜 (or yet another 潘炜), and vice versa. Skip.

What I tried: WebSearch for '潘炜 Wei Pan TU Delft', '潘炜 Newcastle 教授 机器人', '潘炜 Imperial College London 系统辨识', '潘炜 西南交通大学 教授', '潘炜 教授 简介', '潘炜 2026 4月 5月 论文'; curl-fetched panweihit.github.io (about + news), GitHub API user + events for panweihit, Google Scholar profile GqryWPsAAAAJ. ~10 fetches. Stopped because the two-candidate disambiguation cannot be resolved without a hint, and no last-30d activity confirms either.
